title: Skillshare Global Configuration
description: Configuration file for skillshare — the universal AI skill manager. Location: ~/.config/skillshare/config.yaml

source.description: Path to the skills source directory (single source of truth). Supports ~ for home directory.

agents_source.description: Path to the agents source directory. Supports ~ for home directory. Defaults to ~/.config/skillshare/agents if not set.

plugins_source.description: Path to the plugin bundle source directory. Supports ~ for home directory. Defaults to ~/.config/skillshare/plugins if not set.

hooks_source.description: Path to the standalone hook bundle source directory. Supports ~ for home directory. Defaults to ~/.config/skillshare/hooks if not set.

mode.description: Default sync mode for all targets.

target_naming.description: Default target entry naming strategy for merge/copy sync. 'flat' preserves flattened parent directory prefixes; 'standard' uses the SKILL.md name and enforces the Agent Skills standard.

targets.description: AI CLI targets to sync skills and agents to. Keys are target names (e.g. claude, cursor, codex).

ignore.description: Glob patterns for files to skip during sync.

tui.description: Enable or disable interactive TUI mode globally. When false, all commands use plain text output (equivalent to --no-tui on every command).

gitlab_hosts.description: Hostnames of self-managed GitLab instances that use nested subgroups. Hosts containing 'gitlab' are detected automatically.

extras.description: Non-skill resources (rules, commands, etc.) to sync to specific target paths.

targetConfig.description: Configuration for a single sync target. Supports both legacy flat format (path/mode/include/exclude) and new resource sub-keys (skills/agents). Legacy flat fields are auto-migrated to skills: on load.

path.description: [Legacy] Absolute path to the target skills directory. Prefer skills.path instead.

mode.description: [Legacy] Sync mode override. Prefer skills.mode instead.

include.description: [Legacy] Glob patterns for skill include filter. Prefer skills.include instead.

exclude.description: [Legacy] Glob patterns for skill exclude filter. Prefer skills.exclude instead.

skills.description: Skills-specific target configuration. Controls which skills are synced to this target, the sync mode, and the target directory path.

path.description: Override the target skills directory path. If omitted, the built-in default for this target is used. Supports ~ for home directory.

mode.description: Sync mode for skills. If omitted, inherits the top-level mode (defaults to merge).

target_naming.description: Target entry naming strategy for skills. If omitted, inherits the top-level target_naming (defaults to flat). Ignored in symlink mode.

include.description: Glob patterns — only matching skills are synced (merge and copy modes).

exclude.description: Glob patterns — matching skills are excluded from sync (merge and copy modes).

agents.description: (Reserved — not yet available) Agents-specific target configuration. Will be enabled in a future release.

block_threshold.description: Minimum severity level that blocks 'skillshare install'. Scanning always runs regardless of this setting.

profile.description: Audit profile preset. Sets default threshold and dedupe mode. Explicit settings override profile defaults.

dedupe_mode.description: Finding deduplication mode. 'legacy' keeps existing behavior; 'global' applies full composite-key deduplication.

enabled_analyzers.description: Analyzer allowlist. Only listed analyzers will run. Empty or omitted means all analyzers are enabled.

default.description: Default hub label to use for search/install.

builtin.description: Whether this hub is built-in (auto-added on init).

extraConfig.description: Configuration for a non-skill resource type (rules, commands, etc.).

name.description: Name of the extra resource (matches a subdirectory under the source extras directory).

targets.description: Target directories to sync this extra resource to.

extraTargetConfig.description: Configuration for one target of an extra resource.

path.description: Absolute path to the target directory. Supports ~ for home directory.

mode.description: Sync mode for this extra target. Defaults to merge.

flatten.description: When true, files from subdirectories are synced directly into the target root instead of preserving directory structure.
